SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.Context

Packages that use Context
Package
Description
com.nib.commons
Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.
com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.
com.nib.commons.io.catalog
Provides catalog management mechanisms for I/O operations.
com.nib.commons.io.vsam
Provides classes and interfaces for emulating VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organizations.
com.nib.scripting
NIB scripting framework.
com.nib.scripting.utils
NIB Batch utilities
com.nib.scripting.utils.dbutils
DB API
com.nib.scripting.utils.nibsort
SORT
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.systran
System transactions for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.tcp
TCP/IP socket communication support for Supernaut.
com.nib.utilities.api.le
Language Environment (LE) API utilities.

    Constructs an EntrySequentialFile object with the specified Context and FileDescriptor.

    Constructs a new instance of KeySequentialFile using the provided context and file descriptor.

    Constructs a new KeySequentialFile with the given execution context and file descriptor name.

    Constructor for the RecordRelativeFile class that initializes it with a Context and a FileDescriptor.
     
    RecordRelativeFile(Context context, String ddName)
    Constructor for the RecordRelativeFile class that initializes it with a Context and a data definition name (ddName).

  • Uses of Context in com.nib.supernaut

    Subclasses of Context in com.nib.supernaut
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SupernautContext
    SupernautContext provides the contextual environment for executing online programs with services such as region management, terminal handling, task management, and subsystems.
    Constructors in com.nib.supernaut with parameters of type Context
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
